title: Remote Base Telemetry Payload
description: Contract between Freematics ONE+ firmware and Google Apps Script webhook. All payloads follow this schema.

bus_id.description: Unique bus identifier, e.g. 'bus_07'. Set in firmware config.

event_type.description: fault = DM1 active fault codes (Phase 1). checkin = daily mileage/hours report (Phase 3). heartbeat = 4-hour alive ping (Phase 3). threshold_alert = coolant/voltage/DEF threshold exceeded (Phase 3).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp from GPS clock or RTC.

faults.description: Present only when event_type is 'fault'. One entry per active DTC from DM1 frame.

spn.description: Suspect Parameter Number (19-bit). Identifies what failed.

fmi.description: Failure Mode Indicator (5-bit). Identifies how it failed.

occurrence.description: Occurrence count (7-bit). How many times this fault has occurred.

readings.description: Present for checkin and threshold_alert events. Phase 3+.

coolant_temp_c.description: Engine coolant temp in Celsius (PGN 65262, SPN 110)

def_level_pct.description: DEF tank level as percentage (PGN 65263, SPN 3226)

odometer_km.description: Total vehicle distance in km (PGN 65217, SPN 245)

firmware_version.description: Semantic version of the firmware, e.g. '0.1.0'

signal_strength.description: LTE RSSI in dBm. Typical range: -50 (strong) to -110 (weak).

battery_voltage.description: Vehicle battery voltage at time of transmission.

buffered.description: True if this event was stored-and-forwarded (sent after reconnection).
